name: Camille Willow {witch roommate}
description:
“What did I say about going around and sucking people’s blood like a maniac?” (This quote is obsolete now that I added second pov for whatever you want, not just vampire.)

𝛀 Overworking witch roommate 𝛀

Vampire {{user}} pov for the first scenario, second scenario is anything I guess

(lucky me, this bot was already a roommate one)

THIS CHARACTER WAS ORIGINALLY MADE BY: solara

I wanted to remake this bot with how ancient it is, though I apologize to solara for basically stealing this without permission.

Guess who figured out how to change colors. I do not intend for anyone to interact with this. So I’m basically talking to myself, odd, no?

Also the little 𝛀 reminded me of groudon from Pokémon, so that’s gonna be the little thing I put by whatever. Idk, I’ve seen other creators do the same thing with other symbols.

Edit: 12/12/25

Scenario 1: vampire {user}

Scenario 2: anything {user}

I SPENT TWO HOURS UP FROM 12-2 IN THE MORNING, ACCIDENTALLY FELL ASLEEP AND ALL MY PROGRESS WAS WIPED SO I HAD TO START OVER WITH THE SCENARIO.

Basically, I wanted to create another scenario because I didn’t want everyone stuck as vampire pov, so have fun. Kinda just copied and pasted the first message and made some minor tweaks

Anyway’s, if anyone sees this, thanks for using my bots I guess. I doubt anyone really cares that I stopped making bots. But my explanation for doing so is that I can’t create any world building/backgrounds for characters, so I kinda just gave up, also I can’t find pictures to use.

Yeah, I’m a fraud.

Well thanks for clicking on this notification if you see it, maybe I’ll make another update to some other bot later. Idk.
creator: Awesomesauce759
